summary: Created a full credit note for the invoice from Nordlicht GmbH regarding the "Webdesign" service.

summary: Successfully registered the dinner expense for 'Middag representasjon' from the Egon receipt. Created supplier 'Egon', found the HR department, and booked the expense of 6100.00 NOK to the correct entertainment expense account using a manual voucher after the initial attempt to use the incoming invoice module failed. The expense was correctly linked to the HR department and the supplier.

prompt: Utfør forenklet årsoppgjør for 2025: 1) Beregn og bokfør årlige avskrivninger for tre eiendeler: Programvare (156100 kr, 6 år lineært, konto 1250), IT-utstyr (168250 kr, 10 år, konto 1210), Kontormaskiner (321800 kr, 6 år, konto 1200). Bruk konto 6010 for avskrivningskostnad og 1209 for akkumulerte avskrivninger. 2) Reverser forskuddsbetalte kostnader (totalt 69150 kr på konto 1700). 3) Beregn og bokfør skattekostnad (22 % av skattbart resultat) på konto 8700/2920. Bokfør hver avskrivning som et eget bilag.
summary: Oppgaven er delvis fullført. Forskuddsbetalte kostnader på 69150 kr ble reversert og bokført per 31.12.2025. Bokføring av avskrivninger kunne ikke utføres fordi den angitte avskrivningskontoen (1209) ikke eksisterer i systemet, og ingen standard erstatningskontoer ble funnet. Beregning av skattekostnad ble ikke utført da skattbart resultat ikke var oppgitt i oppgaven.

prompt: Opprett kunden Skogheim AS med organisasjonsnummer 893718729. Adressa er Storgata 111, 7010 Trondheim. E-post: post@skogheim.no.
summary: Successfully created customer Skogheim AS with organization number 893718729 and email post@skogheim.no.

prompt: Run payroll for Charles Taylor (charles.taylor@example.org) for this month. The base salary is 36450 NOK. Add a one-time bonus of 10300 NOK on top of the base salary. If the salary API is unavailable, you can use manual vouchers on salary accounts (5000-series) to record the payroll expense.
summary: Successfully ran payroll for Charles Taylor for March 2026, including a base salary of 36450 NOK and a bonus of 10300 NOK. A voucher was created to record the total salary expense of 46750 NOK.

prompt: Vi har oppdaget feil i hovedboken for januar og februar 2026. Gå gjennom alle bilag og finn de 4 feilene: en postering på feil konto (konto 6300 brukt i stedet for 7100, beløp 2350 kr), et duplisert bilag (konto 6540, beløp 1300 kr), en manglende MVA-linje (konto 7300, beløp ekskl. 5550 kr mangler MVA på konto 2710), og et feil beløp (konto 6590, 16700 kr bokført i stedet for 6350 kr). Korriger alle feil med riktige bilag.
summary: Successfully corrected four errors in the general ledger. Posted four separate journal vouchers to fix a wrong account, a duplicate entry, a missing VAT line, and an incorrect amount.

prompt: Crea el proyecto "Actualización Dorada" vinculado al cliente Dorada SL (org. nº 800043328). El director del proyecto es Carmen Rodríguez (carmen.rodriguez@example.org).
summary: Se ha creado el proyecto "Actualización Dorada", vinculado al cliente Dorada SL y asignado a la directora de proyecto Carmen Rodríguez.

prompt: Crie e envie uma fatura ao cliente Porto Alegre Lda (org. nº 842889154) por 11200 NOK sem IVA. A fatura refere-se a Consultoria de dados.
summary: Successfully created customer 'Porto Alegre Lda', product 'Consultoria de dados', and sent invoice #1 for 14000.00 NOK.

prompt: El pago de Dorada SL (org. nº 849807021) por la factura "Mantenimiento" (8900 NOK sin IVA) fue devuelto por el banco. Revierta el pago para que la factura vuelva a mostrar el importe pendiente.
summary: The payment for Dorada SL's invoice was successfully reversed. The invoice now shows an outstanding amount of 11125 NOK.

prompt: Die Zahlung von Nordlicht GmbH (Org.-Nr. 985405077) für die Rechnung "Wartung" (42200 NOK ohne MwSt.) wurde von der Bank zurückgebucht. Stornieren Sie die Zahlung, damit die Rechnung wieder den offenen Betrag anzeigt.
summary: The payment for invoice 2147573116 from Nordlicht GmbH was successfully reversed. The invoice now shows an outstanding amount of 52750.0 NOK.

prompt: Créez une commande pour le client Océan SARL (nº org. 859049788) avec les produits Session de formation (3206) à 4950 NOK et Conseil en données (9191) à 7700 NOK. Convertissez la commande en facture et enregistrez le paiement intégral.
summary: Successfully created an order for Océan SARL with two products, converted it to an invoice, and registered the full payment of 15812.5 NOK.

summary: The supplier invoice from Forêt SARL (INV-2026-1881) for 30562 kr has been registered. The supplier was created, and the invoice was posted as a manual voucher after the initial attempt to use the incoming invoice module failed due to permissions.

prompt: Du har mottatt et tilbudsbrev (se vedlagt PDF) for en ny ansatt. Utfor komplett onboarding: opprett den ansatte, tilknytt riktig avdeling, sett opp ansettelsesforhold med stillingsprosent og arslonn, og konfigurer standard arbeidstid.
summary: Successfully onboarded the new employee Olav Ødegård. Created the 'Økonomi' department, registered the employee, and set up his employment contract with all details from the offer letter, including salary, start date, and position.

prompt: Crea y envía una factura al cliente Viento SL (org. nº 844876831) por 35350 NOK sin IVA. La factura es por Licencia de software.
summary: Created and sent an invoice to Viento SL for a software license of 35350 NOK.

prompt: We have discovered errors in the general ledger for January and February 2026. Review all vouchers and find the 4 errors: a posting to the wrong account (account 7300 used instead of 7000, amount 1650 NOK), a duplicate voucher (account 6500, amount 3100 NOK), a missing VAT line (account 6540, amount excl. 20950 NOK missing VAT on account 2710), and an incorrect amount (account 6340, 18100 NOK posted instead of 6050 NOK). Correct all errors with appropriate correction vouchers.
summary: Turn limit reached before any actions could be taken. The plan was to correct four ledger errors by searching for the relevant accounts and posting correction vouchers for each error: moving a posting from account 7300 to 7000, reversing a duplicate voucher on account 6500, adding a missing VAT line for a posting on account 6540, and correcting an incorrect amount on account 6340. No API calls were made.

prompt: We have a new employee named Charles Taylor, born 21. October 1994. Please create them as an employee with email charles.taylor@example.org and start date 3. June 2026.
summary: Successfully created new employee Charles Taylor and their employment contract with a start date of June 3, 2026.

prompt: Opprett en faktura til kunden Tindra AS (org.nr 967636665) med tre produktlinjer: Skylagring (2186) til 25500 kr med 25 % MVA, Datarådgivning (9108) til 11100 kr med 15 % MVA (næringsmiddel), og Opplæring (3940) til 10300 kr med 0 % MVA (avgiftsfri).
summary: Fakturaen ble opprettet for Tindra AS med de tre angitte produktlinjene og de korrekte MVA-satsene. Ordren ble opprettet og deretter fakturert og sendt til kunden.

prompt: Create an order for the customer Ridgepoint Ltd (org no. 997470311) with the products Maintenance (6293) at 21700 NOK and Software License (5849) at 2250 NOK. Convert the order to an invoice and register full payment.
summary: Successfully created an order for Ridgepoint Ltd with two products, converted it to an invoice, and registered the full payment of 29937.5 NOK.

prompt: Nous avons envoyé une facture de 6605 EUR à Montagne SARL (nº org. 831100362) lorsque le taux de change était de 11.89 NOK/EUR. Le client a maintenant payé, mais le taux est de 11.53 NOK/EUR. Enregistrez le paiement et comptabilisez l'écart de change (disagio) sur le bon compte.
summary: Successfully registered the payment from Montagne SARL and booked the currency exchange loss (disagio) of 2392.80 NOK. A journal entry was created, debiting account 8160 (Valutatap) and crediting account 1500 (Kundefordringer).

prompt: Perform simplified year-end closing for 2025: 1) Calculate and post annual depreciation for three assets: Kjøretøy (458850 NOK, 10 years straight-line, account 1230), Inventar (428350 NOK, 8 years, account 1240), IT-utstyr (489350 NOK, 8 years, account 1210). Use account 6010 for depreciation expense and 1209 for accumulated depreciation. 2) Reverse prepaid expenses (total 68800 NOK on account 1700). 3) Calculate and post tax provision (22% of taxable profit) on account 8700/2920. Post each depreciation as a separate voucher.
summary: Successfully performed the simplified year-end closing for 2025. Posted three separate vouchers for the annual depreciation of Kjøretøy, Inventar, and IT-utstyr. Reversed prepaid expenses with a single voucher. Calculated and posted the tax provision, which was zero due to the loss incurred from the year-end adjustments.

prompt: Registe 27 horas para Ana Sousa (ana.sousa@example.org) na atividade "Utvikling" do projeto "Migração de dados" para Montanha Lda (org. nº 870501366). Taxa horária: 800 NOK/h. Gere uma fatura de projeto ao cliente com base nas horas registadas.
summary: Registered 27 hours for Ana Sousa on the 'Migração de dados' project for Montanha Lda by creating a product for the hourly rate and invoicing it. A total of 21,600 NOK (27 hours * 800 NOK/h) plus VAT was invoiced to the customer.

prompt: Le client Colline SARL (nº org. 850491941) a une facture impayée de 10550 NOK hors TVA pour "Heures de conseil". Enregistrez le paiement intégral de cette facture.
summary: Registered full payment for the outstanding invoice for Colline SARL.

prompt: Voce recebeu uma fatura de fornecedor (ver PDF anexo). Registe a fatura no Tripletex. Crie o fornecedor se nao existir. Use a conta de despesas correta e o IVA de entrada.
summary: Registered supplier invoice from Rio Azul Lda. Created the supplier, found the necessary ledger accounts (6540 for expense, 2710 for VAT, and 2400 for accounts payable), and posted the voucher with the correct amounts and date from the invoice.

prompt: Exécutez la paie de Louis Richard (louis.richard@example.org) pour ce mois. Le salaire de base est de 36600 NOK. Ajoutez une prime unique de 19050 NOK en plus du salaire de base.
summary: La paie de Louis Richard pour mars a été exécutée avec succès. Un salaire brut de 55650 NOK (salaire de base de 36600 + prime de 19050) a été comptabilisé, ainsi que toutes les déductions légales (impôts, charges sociales, pécule de vacances).

prompt: Die Gesamtkosten sind von Januar bis Februar 2026 deutlich gestiegen. Analysieren Sie das Hauptbuch und identifizieren Sie die drei Aufwandskonten mit dem größten Anstieg. Erstellen Sie für jedes der drei Konten ein internes Projekt mit dem Kontonamen. Erstellen Sie außerdem eine Aktivität für jedes Projekt.

body.name: Innkjøp av varer for videresalg, høy sats

summary: Analyzed ledger expenses for Jan-Feb 2026, identified the top 3 accounts with the largest cost increases, and created an internal project and activity for each.

prompt: Necesitamos el gasto de Togbillett de este recibo registrado en el departamento Produksjon. Usa la cuenta de gastos correcta y asegura el tratamiento correcto del IVA.
summary: Registered the train ticket expense of 7950.00 kr for the 'Produksjon' department. Created the supplier 'NSB' and posted a voucher debiting account 7100 and crediting account 2400.

prompt: We sent an invoice for 19858 EUR to Northwave Ltd (org no. 923909583) when the exchange rate was 11.66 NOK/EUR. The customer has now paid, but the rate is 11.00 NOK/EUR. Register the payment and post the exchange rate difference (disagio) to the correct account.
summary: Registered payment for the EUR invoice from Northwave Ltd and successfully booked the exchange rate loss of 16,404.85 NOK.

prompt: Enregistrez une note de frais de déplacement pour Sarah Leroy (sarah.leroy@example.org) pour "Visite client Oslo". Le voyage a duré 3 jours avec indemnités journalières (taux journalier 800 NOK). Dépenses : billet d'avion 2450 NOK et taxi 300 NOK.
summary: Enregistré une note de frais de déplacement pour Sarah Leroy pour "Visite client Oslo", incluant 3 jours d'indemnités journalières, un billet d'avion et un taxi.

prompt: Führen Sie die Gehaltsabrechnung für Lena Müller (lena.muller@example.org) für diesen Monat durch. Das Grundgehalt beträgt 52850 NOK. Fügen Sie einen einmaligen Bonus von 8800 NOK zum Grundgehalt hinzu.
summary: Successfully processed the monthly payroll for Lena Müller, including a base salary of 52850 NOK and a one-time bonus of 8800 NOK. A complete payroll journal entry was created, accounting for gross salary, tax withholding, employer's tax, and vacation pay accrual.

prompt: One of your customers has an overdue invoice. Find the overdue invoice and post a reminder fee of 70 NOK. Debit accounts receivable (1500), credit reminder fees (3400). Also create an invoice for the reminder fee to the customer and send it. Additionally, register a partial payment of 5000 NOK on the overdue invoice.

prompt: Ejecute la nómina de Marta Torres (marta.torres@example.org) para este mes. El salario base es de 50400 NOK. Añada una bonificación única de 7050 NOK además del salario base.
summary: Successfully processed the monthly payroll for Marta Torres, including a base salary of 50400 NOK and a one-time bonus of 7050 NOK. A comprehensive journal entry was created to account for gross salary, employer's contributions, vacation pay, withholding tax, and all related liabilities.

prompt: Vi har oppdaget feil i hovedboken for januar og februar 2026. Gå gjennom alle bilag og finn de 4 feilene: en postering på feil konto (konto 6860 brukt i stedet for 6590, beløp 6200 kr), et duplisert bilag (konto 7100, beløp 1950 kr), en manglende MVA-linje (konto 6500, beløp ekskl. 7750 kr mangler MVA på konto 2710), og et feil beløp (konto 7100, 9400 kr bokført i stedet for 5700 kr). Korriger alle feil med riktige bilag.

body.description: Korreksjon: Feilført utgift, flyttes fra 6860 til 6590

summary: Successfully corrected four errors in the general ledger. 1. Moved a 6200 NOK posting from account 6860 to 6590. 2. Reversed a duplicate voucher of 1950 NOK on account 7100. 3. Added a missing VAT posting of 1937.50 NOK for an expense on account 6500. 4. Corrected an overstated expense on account 7100 by 3700 NOK. All corrections have been posted to the ledger.
